## Privacy Check

- [ ] This change does not add hidden logging, remote data sharing, or durable memory.
- [ ] User prompts, transcripts, selected text, secrets, and sensitive file paths are not exposed in logs or visible status UI unless explicitly intended.
- [ ] Any new remote-provider behavior is gated by explicit user approval.
